top_signals.title: US launches new round of strikes against Iran
top_signals.summary: The U.S. conducted a new wave of strikes against Iranian military sites on Wednesday after reimposing a naval blockade of the Islamic Republic's ports.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board requests comment on a proposal to amend its requirements for banks to maintain anti-money laundering programs
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board requests comment on a proposal to amend its requirements for banks to maintain anti-money laundering programs
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Chevron Moves Closer to Iraq's Biggest Oil Prize—and a Hormuz Exit Strategy
top_signals.summary: Chevron is taking another step toward expanding its footprint in Iraq, and is set to sign two memoranda of understanding on Friday that will move the U.S. supermajor closer to developing the giant West Qurna 2 oilfield and the Nassiriya project. The agreements aren't binding, but they push negotiations forward on what could become one of Chevron's biggest upstream investments in years. West Qurna 2 is no small prize. The southern Iraqi field currently produces about 460,000 barrels per day after Iraq nationalized the asset earlier this year following…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US Air Force turns to cheaper cruise missiles it can buy by the thousands
top_signals.summary: The U.S. Air Force is turning to cruise missiles it can buy by the thousand, cheap enough to shoot many for less than it once cost to shoot one.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
